overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian shantytown built into a canyon with a massive PETROCHEM sign, transitioning to a food vendor overlooking a futuristic cityscape with vertical light beams at dusk.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the settlement passing burning barrels and industrial debris

notable_agents.action: standing still wearing minimal clothing with red bandana and cybernetic implants

entered.detail: two blue barrels with open flames providing warm orange light
large dark highway overpass spanning across the settlement
makeshift multi-level structures built into the rocky cliffside
tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial shantytown beneath a massive concrete overpass. Burning barrels provide warm light against the cool dusk sky. Makeshift structures cling to the rocky cliff walls on the right, and a lone NPC stands near the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shantytown plaza with massive curved containment wall

events.description: camera emerges from under overpass revealing the massive PETROCHEM sign on curved wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while observing the large PETROCHEM sign and surrounding structures

entered.detail: massive white illuminated logo and text on curved concrete wall
elevated cylindrical tank with light on top

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza within the shantytown, revealing a massive curved wall with the illuminated PETROCHEM logo. The camera moves through the settlement built into the canyon, with the moon visible above the wall and industrial structures lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop food stall overlooking futuristic cityscape

events.description: abrupt scene change to food vendor stall with view of city skyline and vertical light beams

agents.ego_description: walking toward the food vendor while observing the cityscape

notable_agents.action: tending to food stall with glowing red items and blue neon lighting

entered.detail: small cart with red glowing food items and blue neon accents
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows
vertical white searchlights rising from behind the skyline
elevated road structure with vehicles visible below

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a food vendor standing at a stall on an elevated ledge overlooking a sprawling futuristic cityscape. Vertical light beams pierce the dusk sky above the skyline, and the vendor tends to glowing red food items as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of an industrial shantytown toward a panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where burning barrels cast a warm glow against the cool dusk sky and makeshift structures cling to rocky cliff walls. As the path opens into a wide plaza, the camera reveals a towering curved wall dominated by an illuminated PETROCHEM logo with the moon visible above the canyon's edge. The scene then shifts from the industrial settlement to an elevated ledge, where the camera approaches a food vendor tending to glowing red items at a stall. Finally, the view expands to overlook a sprawling cityscape where vertical light beams pierce the darkening sky.
